ranked_movies.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
ranked_movies.reason: Heavily discussed due to its record-breaking box office opening, described as the 'Endgame' for horror fans and a major cultural event.

ranked_movies.title: It
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned for its massive box office success and cultural impact, holding the horror opening record for 8 years.

ranked_movies.title: Talk to Me
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as one of the best horror films of the 2020s, praised for its originality and connection to 'Bring Her Back'.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently cited as a generation-defining horror film that created iconic scares and a memorable theater experience.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Widely regarded as a modern masterpiece and one of the best horror films of the 21st century for its intense dread and family trauma.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned for its claustrophobic terror, nightmare-inducing creatures, and brutally bleak ending.

ranked_movies.title: Sinister
ranked_movies.reason: Often cited for its profoundly unsettling Super 8 films and soundtrack, creating a deep sense of fear and unease.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Referenced for its iconic scenes, quotes, and lasting impact as one of the most terrifying and influential horror films ever made.

ranked_movies.title: The Wailing
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as a phenomenal and terrifying film with a complex plot, often listed among the best horror movies of the century.

ranked_movies.title: 28 Days Later
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for revolutionizing the zombie genre and creating the more terrifying 'infected' trope.

ranked_movies.title: Uncut Gems
ranked_movies.reason: Although not a horror film, it is repeatedly mentioned as one of the most anxiety-inducing movies ever made.

ranked_movies.title: Paranormal Activity
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed for its found-footage style, effective scares, and particularly chilling director's cut ending.

ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently praised for its practical effects, paranoia, and considered one of the best horror endings of all time.

ranked_movies.title: Halloween
ranked_movies.reason: Iconic slasher film mentioned for its simple yet effective scares, memorable villain, and perfect ending.

ranked_movies.title: Possessor
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a cerebral and haunting sci-fi thriller, considered one of the best and most disturbing films of the 2020s.

ranked_movies.title: The Witch
ranked_movies.reason: Cited for its unsettling atmosphere and lingering dread, often considered Robert Eggers' best work.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in a political context but revered for its iconic chestburster scene and lasting impact on sci-fi horror.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Quoted for its terrifying lines about hell and its blend of sci-fi and horror, creating a cult classic.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its unique premise, atmospheric setting, and soundtrack, often called a 'comfort horror' film.

ranked_movies.title: The Mist
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently discussed for its brutally bleak and unforgettable ending that leaves a lasting impact.
